programme.title: Blue World Ep505: Mayan Underworld - Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Mexico’s Yucatan, Blue World explores remote cenotes in the jungle that were once used for Mayan rituals. Just reaching the surface of the water requires rappelling down from the forest above. But then, beneath the surface, we encounter strange alien life forms that live in total darkness, and the remains of humans and animal sacrifices from an ancient culture.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep406: Paddling Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Among the numerous islands and atolls of Papua New Guinea, Nikki Gregg experiences traditional festivals, charged canoe races and embarks on an exploratory trip down a remote river.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team gets back to work—this time diving into cross-marketing strategies for Advanced Vitality. Over at Hammer Haag, the team discusses launching a gritty new “Micro Dirty Jobs” miniseries to spotlight American manufacturing in action. We’re also introduced to serial entrepreneur Jeff Kline, founder of 1-800-Medigap, who brings a powerhouse presence to the team’s growing roster. Meanwhile, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s returns for a full brand overhaul with the experts. Newest A-Team member Rudy Mawer steps in with high-level influencer insight and a mission to empower the next generation of entrepreneurs. And finally, Zenith Trek makes bold moves to break into big box retail—with the A-Team guiding the way.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail circle back with the A-Team to map out growth strategies for Law Enforcement Specialists, whose new app has the potential to scale nationwide through smart media outreach. Kyle Reyes takes a personal interest in guiding the process, while the team also welcomes powerhouse attorney Stephen Geday, bringing sharp legal expertise to the roster. David Beavis Photography explores fresh marketing moves and B2B opportunities with designers, laying the groundwork for a gallery launch in Naples, Florida. Provision Brokerage looks to streamline its legacy with a clear plan forward, while new A-Team member Riggs Eckelberry—pioneering disruptor in the water industry—joins the mission. Finally, the team evaluates how Connected & Protected can expand their safety tech beyond seniors and first responders, reaching hospitals and even children.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode kicks off inside the headquarters of Law Enforcement Specialists, where their mission is clear: Prevent. Protect. Respond. From their signed officer wall to their welcoming space for first responders, Bonnie and her team are on the front lines for those who serve. We also get an inside look at their groundbreaking Blue Dispatch software, helping departments streamline jobs and response times. Next, the A-Team travels to Naples, Florida, to celebrate the grand opening of David Beavis’ newest gallery, where his breathtaking photography delivers a powerful message of God’s love and the beauty of creation. Then, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage shows how his company protects seniors’ “safe money” and builds retirement security for the long haul. Finally, we visit the Connected & Protected call center with president Adam Marsh, where their team makes it simple for seniors to stay safe with innovative, easy-to-use technology.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. programme.title: S2E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you to the world’s most extreme mountain biking adventures. Watch Geoff Gulevich, trail master, tackle some of the gnarliest chutes in Williams Lake, BC, dropping in with local legend Cory Brunelle, downhill expert. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill and adrenaline in breathtaking terrain.

programme.title: S3E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic, boundary-pushing adventures. Watch GoPro athlete Kilian Bron, trail innovator, team up with big-mountain skier Victor Broquedis, powder champion, in Peru as they summit Cerro Blanco, the world-record 3,860-foot dune, and ride unforgettable downhill mountain bike and ski runs. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill, speed, and adrenaline.

programme.title: S3E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you heart-pounding downhill action from the Mountain of Hell in Les Alpes, France. Watch GoPro athlete Antoni Villoni, downhill master, as he navigates crashes, weaves through expert trails, and powers down 7,800 vertical feet of snow-capped peaks, dusty singletracks, and technical terrain. Hundreds of riders take on this epic race, where only speed, skill, and courage decide who reaches the finish line first. The rules are simple: first one to cross the line wins...

programme.title: S4E1 Bike
programme.desc: When the sun sets, GoPro Awards recipient Nikolaj Juhlsen lights up the Austrian forest on his downhill mountain bike, GoPro MAX mounted and headlamp blazing. Watch Jonny Livorti take on a daring staircase ride overlooking the Italian Riviera, where speed, finesse, and bravery are essential for this epic descent in Liguria, Italy. Why hike when you can mountain bike? Experience jaw-dropping trails, fearless riders, and the ultimate daredevil MTB action.

programme.title: Toque 12
programme.desc: In this episode Phil takes us to Sundara restaurant at the Four Seasons Jimbaran Bay, Bali, where he explores the venue and ends up in the kitchen with Australian chef Greg Bundt who goes over the preparation of some of his signature dishes.

programme.title: A Taste of Italy with Nisha Katona
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Nisha Katona goes on a culinary journey to discover Italy's hidden foodie gems, learning the regional secrets that influence their dishes

programme.title: American Travelers
programme.desc: Dave & Kari visit Old Town Sacramento, located near their home town of Auburn.

programme.title: It's a Beautiful World
programme.desc: In this episode, chef Mirciny Moliviatis shows us how to cook a traditional Guatemalan dish, and we explore a local street market. We meet Juan Pablo Fuentes, who's transforming education with his student-first approach.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An unholy alliance! Marking the feature film debut of one of Hollywoods most influential and widely referenced auteur directors, Sam Peckinpah, The Deadly Companions centers on a redemptive journey to escort a funeral procession through dangerous India...

programme.title: Brothers of the West
programme.desc: Tom Tyler plays Tom Wade, a range detective whose brother has been accused of robbery and murder. Wade has only one clue to prove his brothers innocence: a set of unusual tire tracks. This film was directed by Sam Katzman, who later became known as Jun...

programme.title: The Fighting Redhead
programme.desc: When a rustler named Faro kills one of his own henchmen and blames it on Sheila O'Conner, Red and Little Beaver set out to clear Sheila and to find evidence against Faro and his gang.

programme.title: Rawhide Rangers
programme.desc: Blackie's gang is creating havoc and the Ranger, Brand Calhoun and his brother go to investigate.

programme.title: Springtime in the Sierras
programme.desc: Ads for this Roy Rogers classic roared HEAD FOR THE MUSICAL HILLS...ROY IS GUNNIN' FOR THRILLS! And thrills are what you'll get when you watch this fun, action packed B-Western from Republic Pictures. There's some great comic relief from Andy Devine an...

programme.title: Jane Got A Gun
programme.desc: A woman asks her ex-lover for help in order to save her outlaw husband from a gang out to kill him.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured.

programme.title: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
programme.desc: Postal inspector Wesley Hull is determined to discover how postmaster Reardon can sell so many stamps.

programme.title: Saint of Travelers
programme.desc: Natives reject the doctrines of Christianity in this biographical tale of missionary Jean Baptiste Lamy.

programme.title: The Jinx
programme.desc: Kate refuses to believe that a visiting cousin is the family jinx despite Luke and Grampa's warnings.

programme.title: PBR Team Series Draft
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: Cowboys & Aliens
programme.desc: Based on the graphic novel by Scott Mitchell Rosenberg.

programme.title: Pat Garrett and Billy the Kid
programme.desc: Garrett, an aging outlaw, becomes a sheriff and has to hunt down his former friend.

programme.title: Stranger on Horseback
programme.desc: A circuit judge (Joel McCrea) squares off against a ruthless cattle baron.

programme.title: Shotgun Slade
programme.desc: A woman hires a vicious killer to murder her fiancé.

programme.title: Wagon Train S2E35 The Andrew Hale Story
programme.desc: A disgraced former judge joins the wagon train, seeking redemption while struggling to maintain his authority and moral compass when he is forced to preside over a tense, life-or-death trial involving members of the expedition.

programme.title: The Big Trees 1952
programme.desc: A ruthless timber tycoon attempts to swindle peaceful homesteaders out of their land in the California redwood forests, only to undergo a change of heart when he faces their resilience and natural beauty

programme.title: Wagon Train S7E32 The Last Circle Up
programme.desc: As the arduous journey nears its end, the members of the wagon train must overcome one final, desperate struggle against both the unforgiving wilderness and internal divisions to ensure their safe arrival

programme.title: The Deadly Companions (1961)
programme.desc: A gunslinger accidentally kills a dance hall girl's son and, consumed by guilt, vows to escort her across dangerous Apache territory to bury the boy in his father’s grave

programme.title: The Belle Starr Story (1968)
programme.desc: A fictionalized account of the legendary outlaw, depicting her transformation from a defiant woman into a notorious gunslinger who leads a gang of bandits in the post-Civil War West

programme.title: Hit The Saddle
programme.desc: Greedy rancher McGowan wants to have a local wild horse sanctuary closed, so he can capture and sell them while Tucson tries to break up Stony's marriage to a sexy, gold-digging saloon girl.

programme.title: Trouble Busters 1933
programme.desc: In Trouble Busters, cowboy hero Ken Maynard gallops into action when outlaws try to seize control of a frontier town. With his quick draw, fearless grit, and trusty horse Tarzan by his side, he takes on rustlers, racketeers, and lawless chaos to bring peace back to the West. Packed with hard-riding thrills and straight-shooting justice, this Western proves that wherever there’s trouble, a hero is ready to bust it wide open.

programme.title: Dead Aim
programme.desc: A traveling gravedigger during an (unspecified) war adopts a orphan he finds alone in the desert. After the war with the orphan grown and business slow, the orphan begins to generate business himself by shooting people

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos 1941
programme.desc: Roy Rogers stars in Robin Hood of the Pecos, a stirring tale set in the turbulent days after the Civil War. When corrupt officials exploit and oppress Texas ranchers, Roy rises as a champion of the people—fighting injustice with his six-guns and his songs. With the help of Gabby Hayes and heroine Marjorie Reynolds, he takes on the villains to bring peace and fairness back to the frontier. Filled with action, music, and Roy’s trademark charm, this Western delivers justice in true outlaw-hero style.
